samples.xml_description:
<module id="fsm">
    <description>Detects a specific sequence of bits in a stream of input data.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="IN">Input signal to be detected.</input>
        <input id="CLK">Clock signal for synchronization.</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal to initialize the FSM.</input>
        <output id="MATCH">Output signal indicating a match condition.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state id="S0">State S0.</state>
        <state id="S1">State S1.</state>
        <state id="S2">State S2.</state>
        <state id="S3">State S3.</state>
        <state id="S4">State S4.</state>
        <state id="S5">State S5.</state>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <reg id="current_state" width_description="[2:0]">Current state register.</reg>
        <reg id="next_state" width_description="[2:0]">Next state register.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        // State transition logic
        always @(posedge CLK or negedge RST) begin
            if (!RST) begin
                current_state <= 3'b000;
            end else begin
                current_state <= next_state;
            end
        end
        
        // Next state logic
        always @(*) begin
            case (current_state)
                3'b000: begin // S0
                    if (IN == 1'b1) begin
                        next_state = 3'b001; // S1
                    end else begin
                        next_state = 3'b000; // S0
                    end
                end
                
                3'b001: begin // S1
                    if (IN == 1'b0) begin
                        next_state = 3'b010; // S2
                    end else begin
                        next_state = 3'b001; // S1
                    end
                end
                
                3'b010: begin // S2
                    if (IN == 1'b0) begin
                        next_state = 3'b011; // S3
                    end else begin
                        next_state = 3'b000; // S0
                    end
                end
                
                3'b011: begin // S3
                    if (IN == 1'b1) begin
                        next_state = 3'b100; // S4
                    end else begin
                        next_state = 3'b000; // S0
                    end
                end
                
                3'b100: begin // S4
                    if (IN == 1'b1) begin
                        next_state = 3'b101; // S5
                    end else begin
                        next_state = 3'b000; // S0
                    end
                end
                
                3'b101: begin // S5
                    if (IN == 1'b0) begin
                        next_state = 3'b000; // S0
                    end else begin
                        next_state = 3'b001; // S1
                    end
                end
                
                default: begin
                    next_state = 3'b000; // Default to S0
                end
            endcase
        end
        
        // Output logic
        assign MATCH = (current_state == 3'b101 && IN == 1'b0);
    </implementation>
</module>
